title: Inheritance, MRO, Super, and Mixins · Behavior Case: Oop Method Overriding
summary: Evaluate extension designs for physical, digital, and restricted library resources. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop method overriding increment in an extensible resource type hierarchy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Override methods while preserving input, output, state, exception, and side-effect expectations of callers.
Use inheritance when a subtype preserves the semantic contract and reusable implementation of its base type.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
